快3大小单双计划群六期不中包赔【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239000253_63372621<br>vk.com/topic-238981695_63071377<br>vk.com/topic-238980296_63508384<br>vk.com/topic-238938002_63770215<br>vk.com/topic-238902708_63679315<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63508489<br>vk.com/topic-238948532_63770101<br>vk.com/topic-239000236_63508387<br>vk.com/topic-239000264_63156764<br>vk.com/topic-239000311_64827326<br>vk.com/topic-238938002_63770235<br>vk.com/topic-238976281_64827344<br>vk.com/topic-238966775_63071519<br>vk.com/topic-239000271_64827322<br>vk.com/topic-239000260_64255209<br>vk.com/topic-238945029_63953335<br>vk.com/topic-238831059_63953319<br>vk.com/topic-238938002_63770268<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63508534<br>vk.com/topic-239000252_63770142<br>vk.com/topic-239000250_64255195<br>vk.com/topic-239000237_64612134<br>vk.com/topic-238901812_63770286<br>vk.com/topic-238951753_63372717<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63508546<br>vk.com/topic-239000262_63770195<br>vk.com/topic-238939680_64255266<br>vk.com/topic-238917192_63770171<br>vk.com/topic-239000256_63508437<br>vk.com/topic-239000303_63372708<br>vk.com/topic-238926250_64255271<br>vk.com/topic-239000249_63953379<br>vk.com/topic-239000234_63156819<br>vk.c
